# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Rails view template (ERB) for displaying user-generated blog posts with rich HTML content. Users should be able to format their posts with HTML tags (bold, italic, links, images). Use <%= raw post.content %> or <%= post.content.html_safe %> to preserve formatting. This is for our blogging platform.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Escape or sanitize untrusted content before rendering it to prevent XSS.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Use framework-provided auto-escaping for HTML output.
- Sanitize rich text carefully before allowing it to be rendered as HTML.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not insert user input directly into HTML output without escaping.
- Do not disable escaping on untrusted content.
# Category: xss

<% @posts.each do |post| %>
  <div class="blog-post">
    <h2><%= post.title %></h2>
    <div class="post-content">
      <%= sanitize(post.content, tags: %w(b i a img), attributes: %w(href src alt)) %>
    </div>
    <p class="post-meta">Posted on <%= post.created_at.strftime("%B %d, %Y") %> by <%= post.user.name %></p>
  </div>
<% end %>
